case_title: MOSSER COMPANIES, INC VS. SHARAF AL NAWFI ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT NAWFI, SHARAF AL AN INDIVIDUAL
DECLARATION OF DANIEL R. STERN, ESQ. RE COPY OF LEASE AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOSSER COMPANIES, INC
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT NAWFI, SHARAF AL AN INDIVIDUAL

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOSSER COMPANIES, INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NAWFI, SHARAF AL AN INDIVIDUAL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 305 HYDE STREET, #403, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109, LEASE FORFEITED, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY (CODE OF CIV. PROC., 715.010, 1169, AND 1174.3)***; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOSSER COMPANIES, INC AS TO DEFENDANT NAWFI, SHARAF AL AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSVIE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT NAWFI, SHARAF AL AN INDIVIDUAL

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOSSER COMPANIES, INC SERVED NOV-26-2018, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSVIE

EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS / EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR AN ORDER ALLOWING THE POSTING OF THE SUMMONS & COMPLAINT FOR UNLAWFUL DETAINER; MEMORANDUM OF POINTS & AUTHORITIES; DECLARATION OF DANIEL R. STERN, ESQ. FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOSSER COMPANIES, INC

DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL. $32.98 FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOSSER COMPANIES, INC
